title: LandUseRecommendation
description: The Queens Borough President's advisory recommendation on a land-use application under the city's Uniform Land Use Review Procedure (ULURP). After hosting a Land Use Public Hearing where applicants seeking variances or zoning-map changes present their plans, the Borough President issues an advisory recommendation in favor or in opposition. NO public API and NO Open Data twin today — this content lives only as HTML/PDF on queensbp.nyc.gov and in ULURP records at DCP/City Planning.

ulurpNumber.description: City Planning ULURP application number (e.g. 'C 240123 ZMQ').

applicationName.description: Name / short title of the land-use application.

applicant.description: The entity seeking the variance or zoning change.

hearingDate.description: Date of the Land Use Public Hearing.

documentUrl.description: URL of the recommendation document / hearing notice.
